rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §261.307 governs child abuse investigation notification procedures. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 261.307. INFORMATION RELATING TO INVESTIGATION PROCEDURE AND CHILD PLACEMENT RESOURCES.
_note: No conflict: proposed tax exemption change has no nexus to Family Code child-protection investigation procedures.
